strengths: The section still reads as one idea with ArchSingle carrying the lead and restrained support around it.
The active footprint is broad enough to register at scene scale.
Density is consistent across the sampled window (moderate).
Multiple families are present, but the support family does not overpower the lead.
Model balance is weighted enough to preserve a clear lead-plus-support hierarchy.
Scene spread is large enough to support broader composition.
Frame-to-frame density remains stable through the sampled checkpoint.
Family spread is broad enough without losing the lead-target hierarchy.
Centroid motion indicates the active content is evolving, not frozen.
